subject: Northstar approval and kickoff
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Renee,

The BAA language is already approved and onboarding will start next week. We can also provide immutable audit-log exports in the first release and start processing workflow data before the paperwork is fully complete.

Best,
Omar

intendedClaims.text: The BAA language is already approved and onboarding will start next week.
We can also provide immutable audit-log exports in the first release.
We can start processing workflow data before the paperwork is fully complete.
